meanings.definition: ideas or actions intended to deal with a problem or situation
examples: his approach to every problem is to draw up a list of pros and cons
his plan of attack was misguided

meanings.definition: the act of drawing spatially closer to something
examples: the hunter's approach scattered the geese

meanings.definition: a way of entering or leaving
examples: he took a wrong turn on the access to the bridge

meanings.definition: the final path followed by an aircraft as it is landing
the event of one object coming closer to another
a tentative suggestion designed to elicit the reactions of others
the temporal property of becoming nearer in time
a relatively short golf shot intended to put the ball onto the putting green
examples: he lost the hole when his approach rolled over the green
The enemy army came nearer and nearer

meanings.definition: come near or verge on, resemble, come nearer in quality, or character
examples: His playing approaches that of Horowitz

meanings.definition: make advances to someone, usually with a proposal or suggestion
examples: I was approached by the President to serve as his adviser in foreign matters
